instruction: Someone repainted the green status dot on the newspaper icon muted purple. Set it back to the original.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/newspaper.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 7.5h1.5m-1.5 3h1.5m-7.5 3h7.5m-7.5 3h7.5m3-9h3.375c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125V18a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.25 2.25M16.5 7.5V18a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25M16.5 7.5V4.875c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H4.125C3.504 3.75 3 4.254 3 4.875V18a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25h13.5M6 7.5h3v3H6v-3Z"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#8c44d0" cx="24" cy="104" r="5" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
